steps.t: Reeve Athelward is in the Mead Hall of Cliving. Burnoth has asked you to relate his message regarding the Khundolar invasion to Reeve Athelward.
Burnoth is encamped with his Riders outside the Mead Hall of Cliving. You should return to Burnoth with Athelward's reply.
